div.style: float: right; display: inline-block; top: -9px; width: 35%;

div.h3: Welcome to Confluence & Jira Audit Add-on for Splunk:
div.p: The Confluence & Jira Audit Add-on for Splunk integrates Atlassian audit log data into your Splunk environment, enabling centralized monitoring and analysis of user activities, administrative actions, and security events across your Confluence and Jira instances. This add-on utilizes the Atlassian REST API to collect audit logs, user activity records, permission changes, and other compliance-related events for enhanced visibility into your Atlassian ecosystem.
Create a custom index on your own to ingest logs.
Get the Activation key by clicking here.

To set up your Atlassian account and fetch audit log details, click on the button below and download the manual.
Download

To configure the add-on, click on the button below and download the manual.
Download

Confluence Audit Logs: Collects audit log events from your Atlassian Confluence instance, including page edits, space administration actions, user permission changes, and other compliance-relevant activities.
Jira Audit Logs: Collects audit log events from your Atlassian Jira instance, including project configuration changes, user management actions, workflow modifications, and administrative events.

p.i: Note: In a Distributed Environment install the add-on in the Heavy Forwarder and Search Head. To avoid data duplication kindly configure the add-on only on Heavy Forwarder for data collection.

p.b: Please feel free to reach out to us in case of any queries at support@avotrix.com.
